calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Catterall for and with Gerald Sellers (Petitioner).

Mr. Catterall stated that he reviewed the Examiners notes, that he spoke to the Examiner and that the Mother (Decedent) came into some money in Mississippi. In addition, Mr. Catterall stated that the Court in Mississippi required an order signed by a California Judge in order to recognize his Client as the sole Heir and that they would not accept the 13100 declaration. The Court stated that Probate Code 11700 only applies when letters are issued, and that if pursuing under Probate Code 248 that it sounded like a Petition for Probate needed to be filed in Mississippi. Mr. Catterall argued that the Decedent died here. The Court denied the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

payments.description: PETN COMMENCING OTHER PROBATE PROCEEDINGS AND OPP
